title: Financial Assistance for setting up of Ornamental Fish Unit in Goa
summary: “Financial Assistance for setting up of Ornamental Fish Unit in Goa” is a scheme by the Dept. of Fisheries, Govt. of Goa. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided to eligible fishermen for setting up Breeding Units and Rearing Units. The applications are accepted only in offline mode.
tags: Fishermen; Fish; Aquaculture; Subsidy; Financial Assistance

title: Integrated Dairy Development Scheme Gujarat
summary: Under this scheme, tribal women beneficiaries are provided with milch cattle, dairy equipment, and financial assistance of up to ₹90,000 per unit.
tags: Financial Assistance; Women; Animal Husbandry; Subsidy

title: Supply of Insulated Boxes
summary: A subsidy to the extent of 75% of the cost for the purchase of an insulated box of at least 50 liters capacity. Only the fisherman engaged in selling and marketing fish, fishing at sea with a canoe, and fishing at sea with a mechanized fishing vessel with upto 6-cylinder engines are eligible.
tags: Fishermen; Fish; Marketing; Financial Assistance; Subsidy

title: "Conversion/Modernisation of Mechanised Fishing Boats for Deep Sea Fishing" under "Financial Assistance for Availing Subsidy Components for the Development of Marine Fisheries"
summary: The scheme "Conversion/Modernisation of Mechanised Fishing Boats for Deep Sea Fishing" is introduced by the Dept of Fisheries and Fishermen Welfare, Govt of Puducherry to increase marine fish production by extending grants for the conversion/modernization of mechanized boats for deep-sea fishing.
tags: Boat; Subsidy; Fisherman; Financial Assistance; Marine

title: "Subsidy for Orthodox & Speciality Tea Unit for Plant & Machinery" under the "Assam Tea Industries Special Incentives Scheme"
summary: The scheme aims to ensure long-term financial sustainability of the Tea industry and to incentivize manufacturers to move from Crush, Tear, Curl tea to Orthodox tea production. The scheme is implemented by the Finance Department and the Industries & Commerce Department, Government of Assam.
categories: Agriculture,Rural & Environment; Banking,Financial Services and Insurance
tags: Subsidy; Tea; Production; Incentive; Industry; Machinery

title: PMMSY: Establishment of New Freshwater Fin Fish Hatcheries-Haryana
summary: The scheme aims to support the establishment of new freshwater finfish hatcheries. Through this scheme, financial assistance in the form of subsidies is provided to beneficiaries for setting up these hatcheries.
tags: Financial Assistance; Subsidy; Setting Up; Hatcheries

title: Gujarat State Electric Vehicle Policy
summary: The policy aims to transition Gujarat's transportation sector towards electric mobility and establish the state as a manufacturing hub for electric vehicles. It provides subsidies for electric vehicle purchases and charging infrastructure development to promote sustainable transportation.
tags: Vehicle; Manufacturing; Subsidy; Infrastructure; Transport; Technology; Environment

title: Food Processing and Value Addition Management
summary: The scheme aims to promote the establishment of food processing units in Uttarakhand, enhance value addition in agricultural and horticultural products, support entrepreneurs with financial assistance, and strengthen the state’s food processing ecosystem.
tags: Food Processing Unit; Value Addition; Subsidy; Entrepreneur

title: Scheme for the Welfare of Schedule Caste Families in Fisheries Sector: Subsidy on Annual Auction of Notified Waters
summary: The objective of the scheme is to provide full-time employment to individuals from Scheduled Caste families in the fisheries sector and uplift their socio-economic status by promoting fish farming through subsidization of fishing contract costs in designated water bodies.
tags: Financial Assistance; Subsidy; Auction; Waters; Fish Culture

title: Solar Home System (Manohar Jyoti)
summary: The "Solar Home System (Manohar Jyoti)" by the Renewable Energy Department, Government of Haryana, aims to promote renewable energy adoption and ensure sustainable power access through solar solutions. Through this scheme, a subsidized solar home lighting system is provided to families.
tags: Solar Home System; Renewable Energy; Solar Subsidy

title: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Motor Cycle with Ice Box - Haryana
summary: The scheme aims to strengthen fish transportation infrastructure and ensure the freshness and quality of fish during transit. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to fishers for purchasing motorcycles equipped with ice boxes, ensuring efficient and hygienic fish transport.
tags: Subsidy; Fishermen; Motorcycle; Fish; Ice Box; Fisheries

title: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Three Wheeler with Ice Box Including E-rickshaws for Fish Vending - Haryana
summary: The scheme aims to promote hygienic and efficient fish transportation and retailing through mobile outlets. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to eligible beneficiaries for purchasing e-rickshaws equipped with ice boxes for selling fish directly.
tags: Subsidy; Fish; Fishries; Three Wheeler; Ice Box

title: Scheme for the Welfare of Schedule Caste Families in Fisheries Sector: Subsidy on 1st Year Lease Money
summary: The objective of the scheme is to provide full-time employment to individuals from Scheduled Caste families in the fisheries sector and to uplift these families by promoting fish farming through financial assistance for leasing Panchayati ponds or watershed areas.
tags: Subsidy; Fish Farming; Schedule Caste; Lease Money; Pond

title: Scheme for the Welfare of Schedule Caste Families in Fisheries Sector: Subsidy on 2nd Year to 5th Year Lease Money
summary: The objective of the scheme is to provide full-time employment to individuals from Scheduled Caste families in the fisheries sector and uplift their economic status by promoting fish farming through financial assistance for leasing Panchayati ponds or watershed areas.
tags: Subsidy; Fish Farming; Scheduled Caste; Fisheries; Lease; Fish

title: Dairy Farming Scheme (HSFDC)
summary: Under this scheme, the Corporation provides loans/benefits to individuals from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families, whose annual family income does not exceed ₹1,80,000/-, in both rural and urban areas for self-employment income generating activities such as dairy farming.
categories: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance; Business & Entrepreneurship
tags: Dairy Farming; HSFDC; Loan; Self-employment; Subsidy; BPL

title: Financial Assistance to Boat owner / Fishermen Captured by Pakistan Marine Security Agency (PMSA)
summary: The scheme aims to help the families of the fishermen affected due to captured by Pakistani Marine Security Agency. Under this scheme, daily assistance, repatriation allowances, and vessel reconstruction subsidies are provided.
tags: Financial Assistance; Fisherman; Boat Owner; PMSA; Subsidy; Fishing Vessels

title: Karma Veer Dadasaheb Gaikwad Sabalikaran & Swabhiman Yojana
summary: The main objective of this scheme is to improve the financial condition of the scheduled castes and Nav-Buddhists who are landless workers and are from "Below Poverty Line". Only citizens who are permanent residents of Maharashtra are eligible. This scheme is 100% funded by the State Govt.
categories: Agriculture,Rural & Environment; Banking,Financial Services and Insurance; Social welfare & Empowerment
tags: Loan; Subsidy; Below Poverty Line; Scheduled Caste; Financial Assistance

title: National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm: Maintenance and Input Cost for Intercropping in Oilpalm
summary: The scheme component "Maintenance and Input Cost for Intercropping in Oilpalm" launched under the "National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm" scheme aims to increase the production of oil palm and reduce imports by providing financial assistance for maintenance and intercropping.
tags: Edible Oil; Oil Palm; Intercropping Assistance; Maintenance Support; Subsidy

title: PMMSY: Installation of Cages in Reservoirs Scheme - Haryana
summary: The scheme aims to promote cage fish farming. It provides grants per unit to the individuals and groups for sustainable aquaculture practices.
tags: Fish Farming; Fishermen; Subsidy; Scheduled Caste; Women; General Category

title: "Financial Grant for Reactivation of Mechanised Boats" under "Financial Assistance for Availing Subsidy Components for the Development of Marine Fisheries"
summary: The scheme "Financial Grant for Reactivation of Mechanised Boats" is introduced by the Govt of Puducherry with the objective of increasing marine fish production by extending financial grants for the reactivation of wooden/steel mechanized boats.
tags: Boat; Grant; Financial Assistance; Fisheries; Fisherman

title: Establishment of Broiler Farms
summary: The scheme aims to promote commercial broiler rearing by providing financial assistance in the form of subsidies for poultry rearing and infrastructure development, thereby enhancing income generation and employment opportunities, especially for women and self-help groups (SHGs).
tags: Broiler Farms; Subsidy; Yard Construction; Broiler Birds; Self Help Group

title: Gau Palan Yojana
summary: The scheme aims to promote cow rearing among eligible Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe beneficiaries, enhancing their livelihood and income generation by providing financial support for cow rearing units.
tags: Cow; Cow Rearing; Scheduled Caste; Scheduled Tribes; Self-employment; Subsidy

title: Bakri Palan Yojana
summary: The scheme aims to promote goat rearing as a source of self-employment and livelihood generation for eligible beneficiaries, particularly from SECC categories, by providing financial support for rearing a goat unit.
tags: Goat Rearing; SECC; Self-Employment; Scheduled Caste; Scheduled Tribe; Subsidy

title: Bhed Palan Yojana
summary: The scheme aims to promote sheep rearing as a source of self-employment and livelihood generation for eligible beneficiaries, particularly from SECC categories, by providing financial support for rearing a sheep unit.
tags: Sheep Rearing; Sheep; Scheduled Caste; Scheduled Tribe; Self-employment; Subsidy

title: Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 25 R.I.R. Bird’s Unit, 100 Broiler Bird’s Unit and Stipend for Poultry Farming Training for Scheduled Caste People
summary: The scheme aims to support Scheduled Caste individuals by providing financial assistance for poultry farming.
tags: Animal Husbandry; Broiler Birds Unit; Poultry Farming; Employment; Training

title: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities by Establishing Piggery, Sheep and Goat Units (General)
summary: This scheme is a credit linked scheme with a primary objective of providing self-employment opportunities, the unemployed persons will be assisted by way of establishing Sheep or Goat Units (15 female+1 male) and Piggery Unit (10 female+1 male).
tags: Self-employment; Piggery Unit; Sheep Unit; Goat Unit; Animal Husbandry; Unemployed; Financial Assistance; Subsidy

title: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units
summary: This is a credit-linked scheme with a primary objective of providing self-employment opportunities to Schedule castes, the unemployed persons will be assisted by way of establishing Dairy units, Piggery units, and Sheep/Goat units.
tags: Financial Assistance; Employment; Scheduled Caste; Livestock Unit; Subsidy; Self-employment; Unemployed; Milch Animals; Piggery Unit; Sheep Unit; Goat Unit

title: Assistance to Co-operative Irrigation Societies M. N. R.-10 (General Area)
summary: The scheme "Assistance to Co-operative Irrigation Societies, M. N. R.-10 (General Area)" aims to increase agricultural production by supporting irrigation cooperative societies through the provision of pumps and electric motors for efficient water distribution.
tags: Irrigation; Co-operative Irrigation Societies; Farm Productivity; Water Distribution

title: Agricultural Activities for Persons with Disabilities
summary: This scheme provides loans up to ₹10,00,000/- to the persons with disabilities for agricultural production, irrigation, horticulture, sericulture, the purchase of agricultural machinery and equipment for agricultural services, and the marketing of agricultural products etc.
tags: Agricultural Activities; PwD; Loan; Disabled Person

title: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
summary: Farmer income support scheme with registration, eKYC, status and grievance facilities.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
tags: pm-kisan; farmer; income support; ekyc

I understand that my Aadhaar number, photograph and demographic information, as understood under the Aadhaar (Targeted Delivery of Financial and Other Subsidies, Benefits and services) Act, 2016 (18 of 2016) and regulations framed there under, is being collected by the Department of Agriculture & Farmer Welfare (DAFW) for the following Purposes: i. Authenticating my identity by way of the Aadhaar Authentication System. ii. Registering on the Portal (https://pmkisan.gov.in), after Authentication, for availing Subsidies, Benefits & Services under Section 7 of the Aadhaar (Targeted Delivery of Financial and Other Subsidies, Benefits and Services) Act, 2016 (18 of 2016); iii. Sharing of my Aadhaar number and Demographic information and photograph, for verifying my Identity for the purpose of determining my eligibility for PM KISAN scheme under Ministry of Agriculture, Government India under Section 7 of the Aadhaar (Targeted Delivery of Financial and Other Subsidies, Benefits and Services) Act, 2016 (18 of 2016); 2. I understand that the Department of Agriculture & Farmer Welfare (DAFW)shall create an Aadhaar-seeded database containing my Aadhaar number, photograph and demographic information for all or any of the purposes enlisted in paragraphs 1(i)-(iii) of this form. 3. I have no objection to provide my Aadhaar Number, photograph and demographic information for Aadhaar based Authentication for the purposes enlisted in paragraphs 1 (i)-(iii) of this form and further for creation of an Aadhaar-seeded database as described Paragraph 2 of this form. 4. I have no objection to share my Aadhaar number with Government of India to check and establishing my eligibility for availing the benefits under the scheme. 5. I also understand that my 'no-objection' accorded in this form is revocable and I have the right to withdraw the same at any time in future, through a communication of opting out.
